name: ExtensionCitation_Note
title: R5: Used for general notes and annotations not coded elsewhere (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Citation.note` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Citation.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Citation.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Citation.note` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
